Changes in Operations (A New Fleet)

• January 12, 2023

I’m glad to announce that I have been brought into the illustious 44th Fleet. With this news, The U.S.S. Anubis will be heading out on various new missions alongside them in the future. I know this is a small update but I felt it was important enough to warrant an update. I look forward to the various things that come with these new changes.

That will be all Ensign. Dismissed.
• Cpt. Keith Ashton
